name: Jabara.Views

values.name: fas
values.comment:
Font Awesome Icon with class attributes.
Please refer Font Awesome css from html file.

    button [] [ fas "class-button-icon" "sync" ]

values.name: fas_
values.comment:
Font Awesome Icon without class attributes.
Please refer Font Awesome css from html file.

    div [] [ input [] [], fas_ "sync" ]
